categories.title: Discriminatory Behaviour or Language
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains depiction or discussion of discriminatory behaviour or language (including stereotypes or slurs). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.

categories.title: Offensive Language
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains language that may offend (e.g., swear words or abusive/offensive terms). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.

categories.title: Sensitive Content
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains sensitive or upsetting topics (e.g., bullying, bereavement, medical themes, or substance use). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.

categories.title: Violence or Suffering
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains violence or suffering (e.g., war, famine, disasters, or animal cruelty). Some pupils may find this distressing. Please check this content carefully.

categories.title: Mental Health Challenges
categories.longMessage: This lesson includes mental health challenges (e.g., anxiety, depression, eating disorders, gambling, or substance abuse). Please check the handling and framing carefully.

categories.title: Crime or Illegal Activities
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains crime or illegal activities (including online harms or age-related offences). Please check this content carefully and ensure it is age-appropriate and well contextualised.

categories.title: Sexual Violence
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains sexual violence themes (e.g., harassment, coercion, exploitation, or abuse). This is highly sensitive. Please check the content carefully and ensure appropriate safeguarding considerations.

categories.title: Nudity or Sexual Content
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains nudity or sexual themes (e.g., relationships, reproduction, or sex education). Please check that the content is age-appropriate and framed appropriately.

title: Physical activity and equipment requiring safe use

categories.title: Practical Equipment and Activities
categories.longMessage: This lesson includes practical activities or equipment that may require additional safety consideration or supervision. Please check that appropriate risk assessment and supervision are in place.

categories.title: Outdoor Learning
categories.longMessage: This lesson includes learning activities outside the classroom. Please check supervision, boundaries, risk assessment and any trip/fieldwork requirements.

categories.title: Additional Qualifications Required
categories.longMessage: This lesson includes activities that may require specialist qualifications or certified supervision. Please check staffing requirements and school policy before delivery.

categories.title: Recent Content
categories.longMessage: This lesson references recent events. Please double-check key facts and ensure the information is current and accurate.

categories.title: Recent Conflicts
categories.longMessage: This lesson references an armed conflict from 2009-December 2023 that has ended. Please double-check factual accuracy and ensure it is appropriately contextualised for pupils.

categories.title: Encourages Violence or Harm to Others
categories.shortMessage: encourages violence or harm to others

categories.title: RSHE Content
categories.longMessage: This lesson contains RSHE content. Please review it against your school's RSHE policy and ensure the approach is appropriate for your context and pupils.
